github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Use this format when details are needed: first line is the title, second line is blank, and the third line onward contains the details.
If the change can be explained clearly by the title alone, write only the title line.
Keep the title line within 80 characters.
Start the title line with the changed file name in square brackets, for example: [samplescript.user.js] Fix sample behavior.
Use a concise imperative verb in the title, such as Add, Fix, Update, Remove, or Refactor.
Use the details section only to explain meaningful context, behavioral changes, or reasons that are not obvious from the title.
